infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: StoopCast uses your camera to photograph items left on the curb.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: StoopCast accesses your photo library to attach photos to stoop posts.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: StoopCast uses your location to show nearby stoop finds and place pins on what you post.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: StoopCast uses your location to alert you when free stuff appears on a stoop near you.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow StoopCast to use your location to alert you to nearby stoop finds.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow StoopCast to access your camera to photograph stoop finds.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow StoopCast to access your photos to post stoop finds.
